overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game showing a character walking down an abandoned rural highway surrounded by pine forests and mountains. The overcast lighting and desaturated colors create a somber atmosphere as the character explores the derelict road with abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rural highway with derelict structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the cracked asphalt road, passing abandoned vehicles and surveying the post-apocalyptic surroundings

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree with thick trunk standing beside the road
derelict white trailer structure with weathered paint
weathered wooden sign with 'SALOME' text visible
large rusted semi-truck cab and trailer parked on the roadside
overhead electrical wires stretching across the highway
steep rock face covered with pine trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a cracked rural highway flanked by pine trees and rocky hills. An abandoned trailer with a 'SALOME' sign stands on the right, followed by a large derelict semi-truck. Power lines stretch overhead against the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open stretch of cracked highway with distant mountain views

events.description: passing a pile of debris or body lying on the right roadside

agents.ego_description: continuing down the open road with distant mountains visible ahead, maintaining a steady walking pace

entered.detail: mountain range covered with dense pine forest visible in the distance
dark pile of debris or corpse lying on the edge of the asphalt
derelict four-door sedan parked on the left shoulder of the road
wooden utility pole supporting electrical wires
metal guardrail beginning to appear along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up to reveal distant forested mountains. The character passes debris on the roadside and approaches an abandoned sedan. Metal guardrails begin to appear on the right as the road starts to curve, with power poles lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway with guardrails and rocky cliff faces

events.description: road enters section with continuous metal guardrails and steep rocky cliffs on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved road next to guardrails, looking out over the valley view to the right

entered.detail: continuous steel guardrail running along the right edge of the road
steep exposed rock wall rising immediately beside the guardrail
expansive view of forested valley and distant mountains through the guardrails

segments.scene_description: The road curves through a section with continuous metal guardrails and steep rocky cliffs on the right. The character walks along the winding asphalt with expansive views of the forested valley visible through the rails, while power lines continue overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey down a desolate rural highway that transitions from a cluttered roadside corridor into an expansive mountain vista. It begins with the character walking past a cracked road flanked by pine trees and rocky hills, passing an abandoned trailer with a Salome sign and a derelict semi-truck under a heavy overcast sky. As the highway opens up, the camera reveals distant forested mountains and passes roadside debris and an abandoned sedan before the road begins to curve. The scene then shifts as metal guardrails appear on the right, guiding the character along a winding stretch of asphalt. Finally, the path curves deeper into the landscape, flanked by steep rocky cliffs and offering expansive views of a forested valley beneath the overhead power lines.
